hook.prompt: Check if the file just written/edited contains any of these patterns: 'assessment-items', 'assessment-tests', '/stimuli', 'oneroster', 'qti.alpha-1edtech', 'api.alpha-1edtech', 'QTI_BASE', 'ONEROSTER_BASE', 'rawXml', 'qti-assessment-item', 'courseComponent', 'componentResource'. If ANY pattern is found and the timeback skill has NOT been loaded in this conversation, respond with: 'This code interacts with the Timeback API. If the skill is already loaded OR no patterns match, respond with nothing.
